/** * @license * Copyright (c) 2016, Contributors * SPDX-License-Identifier: ISC */ export var DefaultValuesForTypeKey; (function (DefaultValuesForTypeKey) { DefaultValuesForTypeKey["BOOLEAN"] = "boolean"; DefaultValuesForTypeKey["STRING"] = "string"; DefaultValuesForTypeKey["NUMBER"] = "number"; DefaultValuesForTypeKey["ARRAY"] = "array"; })(DefaultValuesForTypeKey || (DefaultValuesForTypeKey = {}));
